chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-371 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Directions For hearing of CMA 3762/2024 25-09-2024 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahesar, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** In response to contempt application, reply has been submitted by the Secretary Health (respondent No.1), where an enquiry was conducted as per orders of this Court. Enquiry report is taken on record. Let appropriate action be taken against the petitioner in accordance with law. Accordingly, listed contempt application is dismissed. Let the file be consigned to record. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
